variants.title: Filtrec D126G25A Pressure Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D126G25A. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D126G25A provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Outer Diameter: 50.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 24.5 mm, Length: 257.0 mm
